wordplay_note: Antagonist who employs psi agents against Runciter Associates
card_description: Ray Hollis is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Head of a rival organization who uses psychics for corporate espionage. Name note: Antagonist who employs psi agents against Runciter Associates. Represents the weaponization of parapsychological abilities. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Head of a rival organization who uses psychics for corporate espionage
reference.significance: Represents the weaponization of parapsychological abilities
